output.sparql:
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT ?seasonDate WHERE {
  wd:Q220459 p:P395 ?seasonStatement .
  ?seasonStatement ps:P395 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P577 ?seasonDate .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?seasonDate)
LIMIT 1
output.answer: The TV series Gotham concluded with its fifth season in 2019. There are no upcoming seasons scheduled, as the show ended in 2019.
output.formatted:
The TV series Gotham concluded with its fifth season in 2019. There are no upcoming seasons scheduled, as the show ended in 2019.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT ?seasonDate WHERE {
  wd:Q220459 p:P395 ?seasonStatement .
  ?seasonStatement ps:P395 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P577 ?seasonDate .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?seasonDate)
LIMIT 1
```

Additional rules to follow:
- Explain your thought process before and after each step and function call.
